news.title: De-fi platform Drift suspends deposits and withdrawals after millions in crypto stolen in hack
news.summary: Blockchain trackers put the cryptocurrency heist in the hundreds of millions of dollars and is already on track to be the largest crypto theft in 2026 so far.

news.title: Anthropic took down thousands of GitHub repos trying to yank its leaked source code — a move the company says was an accident
news.summary: Anthropic executives said it was an accident and retracted the bulk of the takedown notices.

news.title: The reputation of troubled YC startup Delve has gotten even worse
news.summary: Delve faces new allegations that it violated the open source license of its customer, Sim.ai, by taking the customers's tool and passing it off as its own.

news.title: ‘System failure’ paralyzes Baidu robotaxis in China
news.summary: Passengers in Baidu's robotaxis were trapped for up to two hours.

news.title: A new dating app, Sonder, has a deliberately annoying sign-up process (and it’s working)
news.summary: Sonder profiles are completely unstructured, encouraging users to build something that looks like a mood board or a digital collage. Think MySpace rather than LinkedIn.

news.summary: Liftoff of Artemis II with four astronauts occurred at 6:35 pm EDT (22:35 UTC) on Wednesday.

news.title: California Suspends Enforcement of Law Requiring VCs to Report Diversity Data
news.summary: After investors appealed to the governor, California again delayed the deadline for venture firms to disclose the demographics of startup founders they back.

news.title: Samsung’s Best OLED TV Is $300 Off
news.summary: The gorgeous Samsung S95F QD-OLED is on super sale ahead of the newest models hitting stores.

news.title: FDA Approves Eli Lilly’s GLP-1 Pill
news.summary: Eli Lilly’s once-daily Foundayo is the second obesity pill to receive FDA approval. It will compete with Novo Nordisk’s pill version of Wegovy.

news.title: AI Models Lie, Cheat, and Steal to Protect Other Models From Being Deleted
news.summary: A new study from researchers at UC Berkeley and UC Santa Cruz suggests models will disobey human commands to protect their own kind.

news.title: The HP OmniBook 5 Is a MacBook Neo Killer, and It’s Only $500
news.summary: The HP OmniBook 5 is a better laptop than the MacBook Neo in almost every way. Right now, it’s also $100 cheaper.
